title: BanzaFederationEvent
description: Event envelope for events that cross operator boundaries. Extends contracts/events/envelope.schema.json with federation-specific fields. Every federation event is a valid base event envelope.

id.description: Globally unique event identifier. Format: 'evt-<uuid>'. Used for deduplication by consumers.

event_type.description: Federation event type. Overrides the base event_type to restrict to the federation.* namespace.

aggregate_type.description: Aggregate type for all federation events. Always 'federation_payment'.

aggregate_id.description: The ID of the primary aggregate this event describes. Typically the routing_request_id.

trace_id.description: Causal trace identifier. MUST be identical across ALL artifacts for the same cross-operator payment on both operators. INV-FED-001.

correlation_id.description: Identifies the current aggregate step within the trace. Typically equals the routing_request_id.

payload.description: Event-specific data. Shape is defined per event_type. All monetary values in payload MUST use integer minor units.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this event was emitted.

federation_version.description: Federation protocol version. Always '1'. Marks this as a federation event.

origin_operator_id.description: operator_id of the operator that emitted this event.

destination_operator_id.description: operator_id of the operator this event concerns.

routing_request_id.description: Routing request this event relates to. Required for federation.routing.* and federation.payment.* event types.

interop_transfer_id.description: Interop transfer ID from Operator B. Required after routing acceptance.

obligation_id.description: Obligation this event relates to. Required for federation.obligation.* and federation.settlement.* event types.
